package rulecoverage

func PositiveWhereClauseTemplatesDuplicatedAcrossRepositories() string {
    ruleID := "where_clause_templates_duplicated_across_repositories"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated filter templates that should be shared through scopes or query builders."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
